title: Network Policies for Zero-Trust
description: Master the implementation of Kubernetes Network Policies to enforce zero-trust security models. Implement fine-grained micro-segmentation to restrict East-West traffic between namespaces based on identity and labels.
objectives: Master the implementation of Kubernetes Network Policies to enforce zero-trust security models.
Implement fine-grained micro-segmentation to restrict East-West traffic between namespaces based on identity and labels.
